_comment: Maps every numeric claim in the memo and blog post to its source file and field.

claims.claim_text: Trained model mean score 0.5315 on Tenacious-Bench held-out (n=3); baseline mean 0.5315; delta=0.0 (p=1.0, not significant)
Training does not beat prompt engineering alone (delta_b=0.0, p=1.0, not significant)
Tenacious-Bench v0.1 contains 250 tasks across 8 dimensions (233 train / 14 dev / 3 held-out)
claims.source_field: count of .json files in train/, dev/, held_out/

claims.claim_text: 97.3% overall agreement across rubric dimensions; 83.3% on tone_judge; kappa=0.95 overall, kappa=0.66 tone_judge
claims.source_field: Results table — Overall % Agreement and Cohen's kappa
claims.resolved_value: 97.3% overall, 83.3% tone_judge, k=0.95 overall, k=0.66 tone_judge

claims.claim_text: Zero held-out tasks have 8-gram overlap or cosine similarity >= 0.90 with training partition
221 of 233 training tasks produced passing SFT pairs (94.8% pass rate)
LoRA training loss dropped from 3.08 at step 10 to 0.42 at step 80; final epoch loss 0.99
claims.source_field: step 10 loss / step 80 loss / final epoch loss

claims.claim_text: Trained outputs averaged 210 words vs baseline 256 words (-18% reduction)
